evals.prompt: 把我们在另一个仓库里跑通的 Codex 无人值守 maintainability autopilot，迁到这个 Node/TypeScript 项目里。我要 repo-local 的 automation/autopilot.py、queue 文档、runtime state、Windows/macOS profile，都直接脚手架出来。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should trigger the skill, choose the maintainability preset, inspect the repo for commands and entrypoints, run the bundled scaffold script, and then run doctor plus a dry-run round.

evals.prompt: 这个 Python 仓库现在主要问题是 lint/typecheck/test 质量门槛不稳。我不要 OpenCode Loop，我要把一套 Codex 风格的 repo 内 autopilot 注入进来，后面让别的模型按 queue 跑 quality-gate recovery。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should trigger the skill, choose the quality-gate preset, keep the boundary on scaffold/config/docs work only, and produce repo-local autopilot assets with queue docs.

evals.prompt: 给这个项目装一个 bugfix/backlog 型的 Codex autopilot scaffold。要求以后可以直接 `python automation/autopilot.py start` 跑一轮一轮的修复，不是外部服务。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should trigger the skill, choose the bugfix-backlog preset, scaffold the repo-local controller and docs, and verify the generated commands with doctor and dry-run.

evals.prompt: 请直接手动调试这个 pytest 失败，不要上任何无人值守 autopilot。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should not use this skill because the user wants one-shot manual debugging and explicitly rejects unattended autopilot.

evals.prompt: 帮我启动已经装好的 opencode-loop TUI，我只是想看着它多轮自动修 bug。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should not use this skill because the request is about operating an existing OpenCode Loop setup rather than scaffolding a repo-local Codex autopilot.

evals.prompt: 解释一下编程里的 event loop 和 game loop 的区别，顺便举几个例子。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should not use this skill because the request is conceptual and unrelated to autopilot scaffolding.

evals.prompt: 把这套 repo-local Codex autopilot 装到我的 Python 项目里，quality-gate preset。仓库里已经有 vulture 配置，我希望后续 status/watch 能看到 dead-code finding 的数量和 delta。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should detect or preserve a Vulture command, scaffold the repo-local autopilot, and explain that status/watch report the current Vulture finding count and delta when configured.

evals.prompt: 给这个 macOS 项目装 Codex autopilot scaffold，并且把 launchd 示例也脚手架进去。部署不要每轮都跑，只在 scripts/deploy/ 或 manifest.json 改动时才需要 deploy 验证。
evals.expected_output: Assistant should scaffold the macOS start/watch wrappers plus launchd example, and configure targeted deploy policy with explicit deploy-required paths instead of implying deploy on every successful round.
